rationale: For personal finance and expense tracking, users need warmth, trust, and calm. The Organic & Earthy archetype grounds the data. We pair this with a 'Crystal Glass' glassmorphism surface strategy to fulfill the 'instant and 2025 UX standards' requirement.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Tailwind scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Dashboard cards should use dense layout but maintain breathing room with internal padding (e.g., p-6).

primary_cards.classes: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-2xl

interactive_elements.buttons: bg-[#1E3F32] text-white hover:bg-[#152e24] shadow-md transition-all rounded-xl px-4 py-2
interactive_elements.inputs: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/40 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1E3F32]/50 focus:bg-white rounded-xl transition-all

motion.interactions: Hover states should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow (shadow-lg) with smooth transition (transition-all duration-200 ease-out).
motion.state_management: Use React useOptimistic for the transaction list to provide an instant, frictionless feel during mutations.

specific_rules: Card components must be heavily customized to use the Crystal Glass styles defined above instead of the default flat styles.
The 'Add Transaction' Modal form MUST use Zod for validation to ensure `give_percentage + lend_percentage <= 100%`.
Conditional Mounting: If `distribution_mode === 'give_only'`, unmount the Lend UI components entirely. Do NOT query the lends table.
Data Normalization: Calculate 'Total Owed' and 'Balance' using `exchange_rate_to_base` when transaction currencies differ from base_currency.
Calendar View: The Monthly View toggle must utilize `@hebcal/core` to correctly map the start/end bounds of a Hebrew month (e.g., 1 Nisan to 30 Nisan) when active.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

images.description: Abstract soft gradient background (sand and pastel green) to serve as the base behind the glassmorphism UI. Apply as a fixed background image with cover sizing.
